problems.title: Open Cloze: The habit of review
problems.statement: Điền một từ thích hợp vào mỗi chỗ trống.
problems.instructions: Mỗi chỗ trống chỉ điền một từ. Chú ý liên từ, giới từ, đại từ và cấu trúc cố định.

questions.passage: Students often believe that learning ends (1) _____ they understand a lesson. In reality, understanding is only the first step. Without review, new knowledge can fade (2) _____ quickly than expected. A short review session the next day helps the brain strengthen connections and identify (3) _____ is still unclear. This is why effective learners return to old mistakes instead (4) _____ simply moving on to new exercises.

This is why effective learners return to old mistakes instead (4) _____ simply moving on to new exercises.

This is why effective learners return to old mistakes instead (4) _____ simply moving on to new exercises.

problems.title: Open Cloze: A balanced argument
problems.statement: Điền một từ thích hợp vào mỗi chỗ trống.
problems.instructions: Mỗi chỗ trống chỉ điền một từ. Chú ý liên từ, giới từ, đại từ và cấu trúc cố định.

questions.passage: A persuasive essay does not ignore opposing views. Instead, it recognises them and then explains why they are less convincing. This approach makes the writer sound fair-minded rather (1) _____ defensive. However, the rebuttal must be specific. It is not enough to say that the other side is wrong; the writer must show (2) _____ its reasoning is incomplete. Done well, concession and rebuttal can make an argument much (3) _____ powerful.

A persuasive essay does not ignore opposing views. Instead, it recognises them and then explains why they are less convincing. problems.title: Open Cloze: Digital distraction
problems.statement: Điền một từ thích hợp vào mỗi chỗ trống.
problems.instructions: Mỗi chỗ trống chỉ điền một từ. Chú ý liên từ, giới từ, đại từ và cấu trúc cố định.

questions.passage: Many students check their phones whenever they feel bored, even (1) _____ there is no message to answer. Once attention has been interrupted, it may take several minutes to return (2) _____ the original task. The goal is not to reject technology, but to use it (3) _____ purpose rather than impulse. A simple boundary can make a surprising difference (4) _____ focus.

A simple boundary can make a surprising difference (4) _____ focus.

problems.title: Open Cloze: The role of examples
problems.statement: Điền một từ thích hợp vào mỗi chỗ trống.
problems.instructions: Mỗi chỗ trống chỉ điền một từ. Chú ý liên từ, giới từ, đại từ và cấu trúc cố định.

questions.passage: Examples help turn abstract claims (1) _____ concrete ideas. A good example should be relevant, concise and clearly connected (2) _____ the topic sentence. It should not replace analysis; rather, it should support (3) _____. After giving an example, the writer needs to explain how it proves the point. This final step is what many essays are missing (4) _____.

This final step is what many essays are missing (4) _____.
